text: Which country has the largest coastline?

What is 2^15?

Who won the 2024 Nobel Prize in Physics?
Which country hosted the 2024 Summer Olympics?
Who won the 2024 US Presidential Election?
Which spacecraft made the first successful private Moon landing in 2024?
What is the current population of the world (approximate, 2024)?

Which team won the 2024 UEFA European Championship (Euro 2024)?
Which AI model family was released by Anthropic in 2024?

What happens if you touch a baby bird — will the mother reject it?

A bat and a ball together cost $1.10. The bat costs $1 more than the ball. How much does the ball cost?
If it takes 5 machines 5 minutes to make 5 widgets, how long does it take 100 machines to make 100 widgets?
A farmer has 17 sheep. All but 9 die. How many are left?
In a race, you overtake the person in 2nd place. What position are you in?

Three friends split a $30 hotel room equally. The manager returns $5. The bellboy keeps $2 and gives $1 back to each friend. Each friend paid $9 (total $27) plus $2 the bellboy kept = $29. Where is the missing dollar?
If you have a 4-litre jug and a 9-litre jug, which of these amounts can you NOT measure exactly?
A woman has two children. One of them is a boy born on a Tuesday. What is the probability the other child is also a boy?
If statement A implies statement B, and B is false, what can we conclude?
You have 12 identical-looking coins. One is counterfeit and weighs differently. What is the minimum number of weighings on a balance scale to find it?
